macro_markets.query: What are the most important macroeconomic and stock market news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major index movements, Fed/central bank news, and significant company earnings or announcements.

crypto_news.query: What are the most significant cryptocurrency and blockchain news from the past 24 hours? Include major price movements, regulatory news, and notable project developments.

items.title: Bitcoin Reclaims $73,000 Amid Easing Geopolitical Tensions
items.summary: Bitcoin surged above $72,000 and briefly touched $73,000, up over 1% in the past 24 hours, driven by easing tensions following US-Iran developments. Ethereum rose 1.93% in tandem.

items.title: Privacy Coins Lead Weekly Gains with Zcash Up 49%, Dash Up 53%
items.summary: Zcash reached $371 (49% weekly rise) and Dash hit $46 (53% gain), outperforming Bitcoin's 8% and Ethereum's 9% weekly increases amid growing institutional interest in privacy projects.

items.title: CLARITY Act Clears Hurdle, Boosting XRP Price Predictions to $10
items.summary: The CLARITY Act advanced, potentially classifying XRP as a digital commodity and enabling institutional adoption, with predictions shifting toward $10 amid ETF inflows.

items.title: Scott Bessent Leads Trump Push for CLARITY Act as Deadline Nears
items.summary: Scott Bessent is spearheading the Trump administration's efforts for the Clarity Act ahead of a crucial deadline, alongside key Q2 regulatory dates impacting the crypto industry.

items.title: MEXC Expands Ondo Finance with Tokenized Eaton Stock and iShares ETFs
items.summary: MEXC added tokenized Eaton stock and iShares ETFs to Ondo Finance's lineup, highlighting growth in tokenized real-world assets.

ai_news.query: What are the most important artificial intelligence and machine learning news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include new model releases, company announcements, research breakthroughs, and industry trends.

items.title: Reinforcement Learning Enters New Phase with Systems Engineering Focus
items.summary: Industry experts convened at NVIDIA GTC to discuss scaling reinforcement learning, highlighting that RL is critical for advanced reasoning and intelligence. The discussion emphasized that future advances require systems engineering to orchestrate complex workflows at scale, with applications in scientific discovery and multi-modal reasoning.

items.title: Meta Announces Muse Spark: New Efficiency-Focused AI Model
items.summary: Meta released Muse Spark, a new closed AI model designed with efficiency as a priority. The model represents Meta's latest advancement in their AI model lineup.

items.title: Chinese AI Company Z.ai Releases GLM-5.1 as Open Source
items.summary: Z.ai publicly released GLM-5.1, an open-source AI model with performance comparable to GPT-level systems. This marks a significant open-source contribution to the AI community.

items.title: Anthropic Launches Claude Managed Agents for Enterprise
items.summary: Anthropic announced Claude Managed Agents, a new offering that runs in isolated environments for enterprise customers. The release includes enhanced management and governance features for business use.

items.title: Claude CoWork Now Available to General Public
items.summary: Claude CoWork, featuring enhanced management and governance capabilities for enterprises, has been made generally available. The platform strengthens collaborative AI features for business applications.

items.title: Genspark Releases AIWorkspace 4.0 for PC-Based AI Agents
items.summary: Genspark launched AIWorkspace 4.0, enabling users to run AI employees directly on their personal computers. The platform represents an evolution in accessible AI agent deployment.

items.title: New Job Role Emerges: AI Agent Manager
items.summary: A new professional role has emerged where individuals manage large numbers of AI agents within organizations. This reflects the growing complexity of AI deployment in enterprise environments.

items.title: Stripe Demonstrates AI-Powered Development at Scale
items.summary: Stripe's internal AI harness system generates 1,300 AI-only pull requests weekly, showcasing the practical application of AI in software development workflows.

gaming.query: What are the most notable video game and gaming industry news from the past 24 hours? Include game releases, announcements, esports, and industry developments.

items.title: Rockstar Games Confirms New Data Breach; GTA 6 Developer Targeted by Hackers
items.summary: Hacker group ShinyHunters claimed to have breached Rockstar Games via third-party analytics platform Anodot, demanding payment by April 14 or threatening to leak stolen data. Rockstar confirmed the breach but stated it would have no impact on players or the organization.

items.title: Nioh 3 Announced with Playable Demo Available Now on PS5
items.summary: Team Ninja and Koei Tecmo announced Nioh 3 during Sony's State of Play showcase, with a playable demo immediately available for PS5 players. The game is confirmed for 2026 release.

items.title: Diablo 4: Lord of Hatred Gameplay Revealed with 12 Minutes of Skovos Chaos
items.summary: New gameplay footage for Diablo 4's Lord of Hatred expansion was revealed, showcasing 12 minutes of Skovos Chaos content.

items.title: Overwatch 2 Introduces New Damage Hero Sierra
items.summary: Overwatch 2 revealed its new damage hero Sierra with a first look at the character's abilities and design.

items.title: Riot Introduces New Changes to Valorant VCT Model Starting 2027
items.summary: Riot Games announced significant changes to the Valorant Champions Tour competitive model that will take effect in 2027.

items.title: Metro Game Announcement Expected Next Week
items.summary: A new Metro game announcement is rumored to be revealed in the coming week, marking the first major announcement for the franchise in some time.

items.title: Assassin's Creed Black Flag Remake 'Resynced' Rumored for Announcement Next Week
items.summary: Reports claim that Ubisoft's Assassin's Creed Black Flag remake, titled Resynced, is set to be announced in the coming week.

tech_news.query: What are the most important technology news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major product launches, company news, and significant tech industry developments. Exclude AI-specific news.
